---
title: "Troubleshooting"
---

## Common issues

### Package installation fails

Try restarting R and running:

```{r}
#| eval: false
install.packages("package_name")
```

### Quarto website does not render

Run:

```bash
quarto check
quarto render
```

### Paths do not work

Use the `here` package or check your working directory.
